response:
Experience the refreshing change in Rajasthan! The Udaipur division, along with other parts of the state, recently received much-needed light to moderate rainfall accompanied by strong winds over the past 24 hours. This welcome weather brought significant relief from the scorching heat that had gripped the region.

According to the Meteorological Department, Udaipur city recorded a noticeable 8 mm of rain. Even more impressively, Sayra in Udaipur district experienced the highest downpour, registering a significant 32 mm. Locals are enjoying the cooler temperatures and the pleasant shift in weather patterns. Discover how this rainfall has transformed the atmosphere across the Udaipur division and brought smiles to many.
